name: Max Limit
overview: Sabah finds herself in a dangerous situation after securing a massive bank loan through a past relationship with a bank employee. She and her husband then face the consequences of betraying trust and mounting social pressure. The story becomes intertwined with money laundering cases, revealing how small decisions can lead to major crises when one's limits are reached.

trailers.title: البرومو الرسمي لمسلسل "حد أقصى" يُعرض في رمضان 2026 على WATCH IT
